query: SELECT projectId, COUNT(*) as total, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT stage) as stages, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT subcategory) as subcategories FROM projectPhotos GROUP BY projectId ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT projectId, COUNT(*) as total, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT stage) as stages, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT subcategory) as subcategories FROM projectPhotos GROUP BY projectId ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 10;
